Clibiya"To invent, You need a good imagination and a pile of junk."Thomas A . Edison

Our vision

Our main goal

Be a leading company with a unique model that provides waste to recycling companies, which combines profitability with environmental concern.

We are investing in global trends

Population that is constantly growing and the rising standard of living is leading to an ever-increasing of energy consumption, food, and housing leading to a steady increase in waste

Our responsibility

We believe that business entities should no cause harm to the environment and strive for circular economy

Who we are - main areas

  • Recycling & Management :

Collection and supply of collected waste to recycling companies and sales of final renewable/ recycled products after recycling

Recycling : used oil , edible oil,  rejected plastic, organic waste

  • Investment :

Real estate - Germany , Poland

Financial – food tech and agriculture

  •  OEM  Production

Chemical products : base oil , bitumen products , polymeric products

Recycling & Management

Black & White model

The “black and white” model of waste management: collection and supply of waste to recycling companies and sale of final renewable/recycled products

Used oil, Edible fats and oil, Rejected plastic, Organic waste

Recycling & renewables

Used oil – recycling and supply

Plastic – recycling and supply of rejected waste of Polyethylene to electricity or heating oil

Edible fats and oil – biofuel

Organic waste – recycling of organic waste to protein

Real Estate Investment

Germany – offices and apartments

Poland - apartments

Financial Investment

Food tech and Agriculture

OEM production

Managing

Clibiya through subsidiary companies manages OEM on third party plants : Semi products for oil industry Industrial chemicals Polymeric additives Anticaking agents

Cooperation with trading companies

Clibiya partners with different trading companies in Europe dealing with : base oils, chemicals, polymers , bitumen products, different waste

Banks & financial institutions

Our team

  • 50+ years of combined experience in industry
  • Extensive knowledge of international trading, real estate and recycling
  • Practical experience in waste collection
  • Wide experience in recycling and refining processes
  • A wide spectrum of skills in logistics, banking, finance , recycling , refining and international tradin
  • standing in a large variety of roles: CEO, Chairman and numerous additional board roles in long-term investment firms
  • Educated in UK and Israel with experienced, professional standing in trading markets across Central and Eastern Europe, and  the Middle East
